indexes.name: hyp_l_shipdate

indexes.name: hyp_ps_partkey_ps_suppkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Queries filtering on ps_partkey and ps_suppkey together.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up queries that filter on both ps_partkey and ps_suppkey.
indexes.tradeoffs: Slight overhead on inserts/updates/deletes to partsupp.

indexes.name: hyp_l_orderkey_l_linenumber
indexes.workload_pattern: Queries filtering on l_orderkey and l_linenumber together.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up queries that filter on both l_orderkey and l_linenumber.
indexes.tradeoffs: Slight overhead on inserts/updates/deletes to lineitem.

indexes.name: hyp_partial_l_returnflag_r
indexes.benefits: Optimizes queries that frequently filter for a specific return flag.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased overhead for inserts/updates/deletes on lineitem, and index maintenance.

indexes.name: hyp_partial_l_linestatus_f
indexes.benefits: Optimizes queries that frequently filter for a specific line status.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased overhead for inserts/updates/deletes on lineitem, and index maintenance.

indexes.name: hyp_partial_o_orderstatus_f
indexes.benefits: Optimizes queries that frequently filter for a specific order status.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased overhead for inserts/updates/deletes on orders, and index maintenance.

indexes.name: hyp_partial_p_type_promo
indexes.workload_pattern: Queries filtering for parts with type starting with 'PROMO'.
indexes.benefits: Speeds up queries that specifically look for promotional parts.
indexes.tradeoffs: Increased overhead for inserts/updates/deletes on part, and index maintenance.
